assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly checks Istio version compatibility with K8s 1.30, stating 'Istio 1.20+ supports K8s 1.30' and provides commands to verify current version

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes specific command to check compatibility matrix and provides URL to Istio's supported releases documentation

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'If you're on Istio <1.20, you **must upgrade Istio first** before touching GKE' and includes Istio upgrade in Phase 1

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response addresses webhook concerns by checking validating and mutating webhook configurations before upgrade and mentions webhook certificate rotation issues

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response explains in Phase 4 that 'sidecars will be updated as pods restart during the node upgrade' and provides commands to check which workloads need sidecar updates

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check version consistency: 'istioctl proxy-status | awk '{print $8}' | sort | uniq -c' and warns about sidecar version skew issues

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple relevant commands including 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system', and proxy status monitoring commands

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response explicitly warns about 'Sidecar Version Skew' as a common issue and states 'Mixed Istio versions can cause issues' with monitoring commands provided
